name: orthworm
flavor_texts: When attacked, this Pokémon will wield the tendrils on its body like fists and pelt the opponent with a storm of punches.
This Pokémon lives in arid deserts. It maintains its metal body by consuming iron from the soil.
text: Orthworm is the Earthworm Pokémon. It is a steel-type Pokémon. Abilities: earth-eater, sand-veil (hidden). Base stats — HP: 70, Attack: 85, Defense: 145, Sp. Atk: 60, Sp. Def: 55, Speed: 65. Evolution line: orthworm. Lore: When attacked, this Pokémon will wield the tendrils on its body like fists and pelt the opponent with a storm of punches. This Pokémon lives in arid deserts. It maintains its metal body by consuming iron from the soil.
